name: Revlon Touch and Glow Advanced Glow Cream

Peel-off format forms flexible film that lifts away dirt and dead skin cells effortlessly.

Lemon Peel Oil – Brightens and refreshes. Mulberry Fruit Extract – Natural brightening agent that helps even skin tone. Turmeric Oil – Anti-inflammatory and brightening benefits.

name: Dot & Key 72HR Hydrating Gel Moisturizer + Probiotics
key_benefits: Intense hydration with Hyaluronic Acid locks in water molecules for long-lasting, oil-free moisture that leaves skin plump, nourished and dewy. Microbiome balancing with probiotics restores skin's natural defense system for healthier, more resilient barrier. Elasticity boost and soothing properties from Japanese Rice calm redness, irritation and inflammation while improving skin texture. Clean formulation with naturally derived ingredients—sulphate-free, mineral oil-free, essential oil-free, paraben-free, cruelty-free and GMO-free.

Probiotics – Restores and balances skin's microbiome level, enhancing natural defense system . Japanese Rice – Natural soothing agent that calms redness, irritation and inflammation while improving skin texture . Glycerin & Squalane – Deliver additional hydration and support skin barrier function .
ideal_for: All skin types targeting dehydration, irritation, redness, weakened skin barrier and those needing lightweight daily hydration.

name: VLCC Bridal Glow Facial Kit
key_benefits: Complete 6-step bridal facial kit for luminous brightness and healthy, radiant glow. Infused with Niacinamide to even out skin texture, Hyaluronic Acid for intense hydration, and Vitamin C to brighten skin tone and improve elasticity. Includes illuminating serum and 3 finishing strobe creams (Golden, Rose and Lilac Tint) to highlight radiance. Delivers porcelain smooth, healthy-looking, soft skin in minutes.
key_ingredients: Niacinamide – Even out skin texture and promote lighter skin tone. Hyaluronic Acid – Provides intense hydration. Vitamin C – Brightens skin tone and improves elasticity. Skin Illuminating Cleanser – Cleanses dirt and impurities. Micro Scrub Polisher – Exfoliates dead skin cells. Nourishing Massage Cream – Moisturizes, softens and hydrates. Radiance Boosting Mask – Rejuvenates, brightens and plumps skin. Illuminating Serum – Adds dewy glow and balances oil. Finishing Strobe Creams – Available in Golden, Rose and Lilac Tint for customizable highlight.
ideal_for: Brides and anyone seeking a complete at-home facial for glowing, radiant, even-toned skin. Suitable for special occasions or regular pampering.
how_to_use: Step 1 – Skin Illuminating Cleanser: Apply in circular strokes for 2–3 minutes, rinse with cool water. Step 2 – Micro Scrub Polisher: Apply on wet face and neck, leave 2–3 minutes, massage gently for 3–4 minutes, rinse. Step 3 – Nourishing Massage Cream: Massage with light circular upward strokes for 10–15 minutes until absorbed. Step 4 – Radiance Boosting Mask: Apply thin even layer avoiding eye area, place wet cotton pads over eyes, relax for 10–15 minutes, wash with cool water, pat dry. Step 5 – Illuminating Serum: Apply 2–3 drops uniformly over face and neck. Step 6 – Finishing Strobe Cream: Choose Golden, Rose or Lilac Tint, dab on palm, evenly smear on desired areas for highlight.

name: Makeup Revolution Shimmer Bomb Lip Gloss
key_benefits: Super sparkly gloss with a shimmery, sheer formulation for maximum volume and impact. Infused with Vitamin E for extra nourishment. key_ingredients: Talc, Mica, Silica, Methylparaben, Propylparaben. May Contain: CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide). Infused with Vitamin E for nourishment.

name: Lakme Eyeconic Kajal
key_benefits: Smudge-proof and transfer-proof formula stays put all day without smearing. Deep black color delivers intense, mesmerizing definition for bold eyes. Waterproof performance survives tears, face washes, and humidity. Ophthalmologically tested for eye safety. 24-hour stay keeps eyes mesmerizing all day long. Easy one-stroke application glides smoothly and dries quickly, yet removes easily when desired.

name: Bioderma Photoderm Aquafluide Claire SPF 100+
key_benefits: SPF 100 UVA 40 provides tailored protection for extreme sun exposure conditions. Reinforced biological protection with Cellular Bioprotection™ offers 74% antioxidant defense. Moisturizing lightweight texture delivers 8 hours of comfort while preventing signs of aging due to photopollution. New generation formula with no polemic filters and plant-based texture. Extreme fluidity with dry touch finish. Protects against harmful UV rays including sunburn and sun allergies.

name: Pilgrim Korean Rice Water Hydra Glow Moisturizer
key_benefits: Instant glass-skin glow with Korean Rice Water. Deep hydration through 5-Hyaluronic Acid Complex that locks moisture at different skin layers. Lightweight gel texture with quick-absorbing, non-greasy formula. Perfect for all seasons.

name: Revlon Charlie EDT Gold
key_benefits: Timeless and iconic classic fragrance from Revlon Charlie that never goes out of style. Elegant oriental floral scent with warm, spicy and sweet blend of fruity and floral accords for feminine, sophisticated aura. Great value offering affordable luxury for everyday use.

ideal_for: Women seeking timeless, elegant oriental floral fragrance for everyday wear. Perfect for daytime, office settings and cooler seasons. Suitable for those who appreciate warm, spicy and sweet scent profiles.

name: Neutrogena Oil-Free Acne Face Wash with 2% Salicylic Acid
